# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls


apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1

metadata:

  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app-2

  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---

  name: my-service-96
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app-96
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service-97
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app-97
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 80
---
